title: Reinstatement of owner in possession
doc_html:
§600.41.  Reinstatement of owner in possession

An owner may petition for reinstatement of the owner's control and possession of the property at any time during the receivership term.

Acts 2006, No. 355, §1, eff. June 13, 2006.
doc_text:
§600.41.  Reinstatement of owner in possession
An owner may petition for reinstatement of the owner's control and possession of the property at any time during the receivership term.
Acts 2006, No. 355, §1, eff. June 13, 2006.
